articles.title: Boston Marathon race director to run with his 3 kids — and astronaut Sunita Williams
articles.description:
Dave McGillivray will run his 54th Boston Marathon with three of his kids and longtime friend, retired astronaut Sunita Williams.

The post Boston Marathon race director to run with his 3 kids — and astronaut Sunita Williams appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Dave McGillivray will run his 54th Boston Marathon on April 17, 2023.
He will be joined by his three children and astronaut Sunita Williams.
This event highlights family participation and community spirit in Boston's iconic race.

articles.title: Jayson Tatum, Derrick White sound off on ‘ridiculous’ Jaylen Brown ejection
articles.description:
"He definitely earned the first one," White said. "I thought the second one was [expletive], honestly."

The post Jayson Tatum, Derrick White sound off on ‘ridiculous’ Jaylen Brown ejection appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown was ejected during a recent game, sparking controversy among teammates.
Derrick White criticized the second ejection, calling it 'ridiculous' on March 11, 2026.
The ejection could affect team morale and performance in upcoming games for Boston fans.

articles.title: He’s running Boston to honor of his mother’s adventurous spirit
articles.description:
"She inspired me to realize that life only stops being an adventure when you stop dreaming and believing."

The post He’s running Boston to honor of his mother’s adventurous spirit appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: James Hebert is running the Boston Marathon to honor his mother's adventurous spirit.
Hebert's mother inspired him to pursue dreams and embrace life's adventures.
The marathon on April 17, 2023, highlights local stories of resilience and inspiration.
